description_long: This object is a classic handheld gaming console, specifically a Nintendo Game Boy, accompanied by a Tetris game cartridge. The main body is rectangular with rounded edges, predominantly light gray in color, and features a large green-tinted screen on the upper half of the front face. Below the screen are a black D-pad, two maroon circular buttons, and two smaller oval buttons, all made of plastic. The back of the device has a battery compartment and a slot where the game cartridge is inserted, with the cartridge partially ejected in some views. The device is constructed primarily from molded plastic, with visible seams and venting slots on the rear, and contains internal electronic components. The overall design is compact and portable, with tactile buttons and a cartridge slot for interchangeable games.
description: A classic Nintendo Game Boy handheld console with a Tetris cartridge, featuring a large screen, tactile buttons, and a cartridge slot on the back. The device is light gray with maroon and black accents, designed for portable gaming.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen, D-pad, two maroon buttons, and two smaller oval buttons, with the Tetris cartridge placed beside the console.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the console and the partially inserted Tetris cartridge protruding from the back slot.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the battery compartment, venting slots, and the Tetris cartridge fully inserted into the slot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cartridge being removed from the slot, emphasizing the depth and side profile of the device.
